items.name: Amara K.
items.comment: Christiana is absolutely incredible! She did my traditional locs and the result was breathtaking. The whole experience felt so personal and luxurious, leaving me feeling like a completely new woman. TianaLux is the real deal in Newfoundland.

items.name: Sophia M.
items.comment: I got my Ombré Brows done at Brows by Tiana and I'm obsessed! Christiana took her time to map out the perfect shape for my face. The semi-permanent results are gorgeous; I get compliments every single day.

items.name: Chloe D.
items.comment: My microloc installation was done so beautifully, with unmatched precision and detail. TianaLux made the whole process comfortable and fun. I'm booked for my retie already!
